reviews.comment:
Me salvó porque esta abierto las 24 hs y salir a buscar agua en horario de siesta con 39 grados  no es para nada agradable se paga caro pero se sabe si tuviera un local en San Juan me lleno de plata

(Translated by Google)
It saved me because it's open 24 hours a day and going out to get water during siesta time in 39 degree heat isn't pleasant at all, it's expensive, but you know if I had a store in San Juan I'd be making a fortune.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzcXY3bHl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente personal.... lastima un gordo morocho q parece ser encargado, mal hablado, antipatico, mal educado, soy socio hace mas de 20 años del aca y cargo entre 3 y 4 veces  x semana

(Translated by Google)
Excellent staff....it's a shame about the fat, dark-haired guy who seems to be in charge; he's foul-mouthed, unfriendly, and rude. I've been a member of the ACA for over 20 years and I fill up between 3 and 4 times a week.
